issue-5
1. Transcript Coming soon
2. This month's Traffic Pros features not only a traffic model, but also a legitimate biz op model for
creating simple websites that generate up to 10X ROI. In other words, for every dollar you spend on
the site, from traffic to build, you can earn up to ten dollars.
3. Keith Baxter is the world's foremost expert on building sites that capture 'existing' traffic to
high volume products, and leverages them to create a massive affiliate income stream. This is
perfect if you do not have a product of your own, and you'll also find that your 3X VSL training will
come in handy for many stages of this process. Keith goes into absolute detail on how to build these
mini sites on your own, all through outsourcing, down to the article content. It's the most hands off
yet high dollar model I've seen for affiliates who want to leverage traffic to other products.
4. Even if you're like me and have products of your own, you'll find this month's issue very rewarding,
and yet another feather to add to your online financial cap!
